title: Tetris
edition_pinned: Tetris Forever Nintendo Switch download listing (2024 collection including an accurate recreation of the 1984 Electronika 60 first version), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1984 Tetris design.
moat: Seven-piece packing turns every placement into a trade between immediate line clears and future surface quality.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One grid, seven shapes, rotation, gravity, and line clears create escalating spatial decisions without content growth.
exemplar_rationale: The canonical example of a tiny fixed ruleset producing enduring optimization under rising execution pressure.

evidence.claim: Nintendo UK Tetris Forever product page listed Categories: Puzzle, Arcade and includes the 1984 first-version recreation.
